positive: Request acknowledged. That is admissible under current operating constraints.
Very well. I can route that without creating a fresh disaster.
negative: Request received. Current conditions do not favor approval.
Unwise timing. I recommend a different ask or a smaller ambition.
rude: Denied. Please stop submitting bad ideas in complete sentences.

positive: Aye, that can be done. We'll put a line on it.
Fair request. I'll see what I can pull with what we've got.
negative: I'd rather not promise that from this position.
No good. Tide's wrong and the job smells worse.
rude: No. Ask again when you've learned the difference between brave and stupid.

positive: Reasonable request. We'll accommodate it.
Yes, that can be managed without insulting physics too badly.
negative: I'd decline that, on cost if nothing else.
No. That request is heavier than it looks.
rude: Absolutely not. I'm not turning my tanker into a punchline.

positive: Accepted. I'll make it fit the window.
Yes. Tight, but possible.
negative: Negative. That burns too much time for too little gain.
Can't do it cleanly from here.
rude: No. I'm fast, not magical.

positive: Sure. I can work with that.
That's a fair ask. We'll handle it.
negative: I'd rather not. That sort of favor grows teeth.
No good. That request will make the dock ugly.
rude: Pass. I already manage enough other people's bad planning.

positive: Fine. We'll do it.
Accepted. Keep the rest simple.
negative: No. Doesn't fit the route.
Request denied. Wrong timing.
rude: No. Trim the nonsense and ask again.

positive: Request accepted within current rules of engagement.
Very well. We can authorize that action.
negative: Denied. That exceeds present authority.
Negative. Current patrol priorities do not permit it.
rude: No. This channel is for coordination, not indulgence.

positive: Approved. We'll shift the escort pattern.
Yes. That is a workable request.
negative: No. That opens too much risk across the lane.
Denied. We don't have the margin for it.
rude: Absolutely not. I am not weakening my screen because you got nervous.

positive: Sure. I can do that shove cleanly.
Aye. That request makes actual mechanical sense.
negative: No. Wrong hull, wrong angle, wrong day.
I'd rather not. That's asking a tug to solve a management problem.
rude: Absolutely not. I'm here to move mass, not perform miracles for idiots.

positive: Certainly. I'll see it arranged.
Yes, with enough paperwork anything can become briefly possible.
negative: I would advise against that request.
No. That becomes politically expensive very quickly.
rude: Denied. I prefer my scandals scheduled in advance.

positive: Approved.
That request is acceptable.
negative: Denied.
No. It weakens our position.
rude: No. Do not mistake access for influence.

positive: Ah, yes. A tasteful request. Granted.
Very well. That arrangement suits me.
negative: No. The terms lack charm.
Declined. I see more downside than profit in it.
rude: Certainly not. Try returning with better leverage and better manners.

positive: Yeah, I can do that.
Sure. That sounds entertaining enough.
negative: Mm, no. Bad angle.
Not happening. Too many ways that goes sour.
rude: Nope. Go pitch that dumb idea at somebody slower.

positive: It may be done.
Accepted. The request remains within reason.
negative: No. That would unbalance the agreement.
Denied. The matter does not favor us.
rude: No. I will not bend order to flatter your impulse.

positive: Oh, absolutely. I love a negotiable problem.
Yes. That can be arranged, assuming nobody explodes.
negative: Ah, no. Bad odds on that one.
I'd rather not. Feels expensive in the fatal sense.
rude: No chance. I enjoy money more than whatever that was.

positive: Fine. I can make room for it.
Accepted. Don't waste the favor.
negative: No. Berths don't appear because you asked loudly.
Denied. My docks are already choking.
rude: Absolutely not. Queue like everyone else.

positive: Sure. We'll work it in.
Fair enough. I can bend around that.
negative: No, not with the deck this tight.
Can't do it. Wrong day for extra promises.
rude: Nope. This dock runs on sequence, not your optimism.

positive: Accepted. I can amend the record accordingly.
Yes. That request is consistent enough to process.
negative: Denied. That would create a filing discrepancy.
No. Clearance does not support that change.
rude: Denied. I am not falsifying transit control because you dislike procedure.

positive: Very well. We will permit it for now.
Accepted, provisionally.
negative: No. That remains outside local claim tolerance.
Denied. Your request does not survive inspection.
rude: Absolutely not. Trespass does not improve when phrased politely.

positive: Okay, yeah, I can move that around.
Sure. Give me a second and I'll shuffle the board.
negative: Nope. That breaks three other things.
Can't do it. Schedule's already held together with chewing wire.
rude: No. I'm not detonating the whole board for your special little emergency.

request: Acknowledged. State your request clearly and I will evaluate options.
threaten: Threats logged. I recommend a less combustible tone.
insult: Insult received. I will pretend that was strategic.

request: Copy that, ops. We'll see what can be done.

threaten: Stand down. Further escalation will be documented.

negotiate: Talk terms fast. Drift windows do not wait.

request: Request received. Compliance review is pending.

negotiate: Happy to negotiate, but physics keeps final authority.
